description_long: This is a classic red coupe car with a boxy, vintage design reminiscent of mid-to-late 20th-century European sedans. The car features a hardtop roof, four doors, and chrome trim along the windows and door handles. The wheels are fitted with simple, period-appropriate hubcaps, and the tires have a moderate profile. The front grille is narrow and horizontal, flanked by round headlights, while the rear is squared off with rectangular taillights and a visible license plate area. The windows are large, providing good visibility, and the interior appears to be upholstered in a light tan or beige material. The overall condition suggests some age, with a slightly matte finish and subtle wear visible on the paint.
description: A vintage red coupe car with a boxy silhouette, chrome trim, and four doors, featuring a hardtop roof and classic round headlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the car, four doors, chrome trim, and classic wheel design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the squared-off trunk, rectangular taillights, and license plate area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the car's length, door arrangement, and chrome details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the narrow grille, round headlights, and the windshield with visible steering wheel and dashboard.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door sedan with two side windows per side
